verifyParticipant(address).details: Acts as an external screening system. The FedLang Team verifies  participant profiles off-chain and provides on-chain validation at the platform level.

params._participant: The wallet address of the participant to verify

canAggregate(uint256).notice: Checks if the project has enough submissions to start aggregation for the round

createProject(string,string,string,strin.notice: Creates a new federated learning project with an initial global model

finalizeProject(uint256).notice: Ends the project, marks it inactive, and refunds remaining budget to initiator

finalizeRound(uint256,string,address[],u.notice: Finalizes the current round, aggregates models (off-chain), distributes rewards, and starts the next round

joinProject(uint256).notice: Allows a verified participant to join an active project

registerDID(string).notice: Registers a decentralized identifier (DID) for the sender's wallet

submitUpdate(uint256,string,bytes32,byte.notice: Submits a local model update contribution for the current round

verifyParticipant(address).notice: Verifies a participant on-chain after off-chain verification by admin

withdrawRewards().notice: Withdraws the caller's earned reward balance
